# Example 01 — minimal

The smallest case: one base class in `mypkg/base/modeling_base.py`, one
child modular file `mypkg/child/modular_child.py` that inherits from it,
and one generated output `mypkg/child/modeling_child.py`.

## Run

```bash
uv run python examples/01_minimal/run.py
```

Expected output (truncated)::

    --- generated modeling_child.py ---
    # Auto-generated by pycodelift from .../modular_child.py.
    ...
    class ChildModel(BaseModel):
        ...

The generated file is **not** written to disk by default — `run.py`
prints it. Pass `--write` if you want to inspect it under
`mypkg/child/modeling_child.py`.
